metadata.description: Workflow — build and run custom AI workflows as agent graphs. Also: Workflow Builder, Universe Builder, Custom AI Builder.

plugins.name: workflow-universe-server
plugins.description: Workflow / Workflow Builder — build, run, and steer custom AI agent workflows inside shared universes. Ships a long-form fiction domain (Author daemons writing novels) and extends to other domains via custom graph nodes. Also known as: workflow builder, custom AI builder, universe builder, agent workflow platform.
